meals.label: Meal A
meals.name: Slow Cooker Chili
meals.meta: ~15 min prep · 6 hrs slow cooker · Serves 8
ings: 2 (14.5 oz) cans diced tomatoes with mild green chilies
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 (15 oz) can dark red kidney beans, drained
1 (15 oz) can light red kidney beans, drained
Toppings: shredded cheddar, sour cream, sliced green onions
steps: Set up Monday morning. Sauté onion 3 min in olive oil, add garlic 30 sec. Transfer to slow cooker.
Brown ground beef in same skillet. Drain fat. Add to slow cooker.
Stir in all remaining ingredients. Season with salt and pepper.
Cover and cook on LOW 5–6 hours (or HIGH 3 hours).
Stir in kidney beans. Heat through 2 min.
Serve with cheddar, sour cream, and green onions.
meals.note: 💡 Set up Monday morning — dinner is hands-off by Tuesday. Makes 8 servings; freeze half.

meals.label: Meal B
meals.name: Butter Cauliflower
ings: 1 medium head cauliflower, cut into florets
Fresh cilantro + plain Greek yogurt to garnish
steps: Mix lemon juice, cornstarch, ½ tsp cumin, ½ tsp turmeric, 1 tsp garam masala, ½ tsp salt in a bowl.
Sear cauliflower in 1 tbsp oil 7–8 min. Toss in cornstarch mixture, return to skillet, cook 7–8 more min. Remove to bowl.
Add remaining oil and butter. Sauté onion 8 min. Add garlic, ginger, tomato paste; cook 2 min. Add spices; toast 1 min.
Add tomato sauce and broth. Simmer. Stir in cream, return cauliflower. Simmer 15 min.
Serve over basmati rice with cilantro and Greek yogurt.
meals.note: 💡 The double-cook on the cauliflower is what makes this dish. Skip cayenne for the kids.

meals.label: Meal C
meals.name: Turkey & Veggie Bolognese over Casarecce
ings: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 tbsp fresh basil, chopped (or 1 tsp dried)
steps: Sauté onion 5–7 min in olive oil. Add garlic, cook 30 sec.
Add turkey, brown 7–8 min. Season with granulated garlic, salt, pepper.
Add zucchini and mushrooms. Cook 4–5 min until softened.
Stir in tomato paste, cook 2 min.
Add crushed tomatoes, puree, sugar, basil. Simmer uncovered 30–35 min until thick.
Cook casarecce al dente. Reserve 1 cup pasta water. Toss pasta with sauce.
Serve with generous Parmesan.
meals.note: 💡 Can't find casarecce? Rigatoni or mafaldine work great. Sauce freezes well — make a full batch and stash half.

meals.label: Meal A
meals.name: Sheet Pan Beef & Broccoli
ings: 1½ lb flank steak or sirloin, sliced thin against the grain
Sesame seeds + sliced green onions for garnish
steps: Preheat oven to 425°F. Start rice on stovetop: 1½ cups rice + 3 cups water, bring to boil, reduce to low, cover, 18 min.

Slice beef very thin against the grain. Whisk together soy sauce, oyster sauce, sesame oil, honey, ginger, garlic, and cornstarch into a marinade. Toss beef in half the marinade and set aside 10 minutes.
Toss broccoli florets with vegetable oil, salt, and pepper on a large sheet pan. Roast 8 minutes.
Push broccoli to the sides. Spread marinated beef in a single layer in the center. Roast everything 8–10 more minutes until beef is cooked through and broccoli is lightly charred.
Warm remaining marinade in a small saucepan over medium heat, adding a splash of water to thin slightly, until it simmers and thickens into a glossy sauce.
Serve beef and broccoli over rice. Drizzle with extra sauce. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions.
meals.note: 💡 Slice the beef as thin as possible. The marinade does double duty as the finishing sauce.

meals.label: Meal B
meals.name: Black Bean & Sweet Potato Enchiladas
ings: 2 large sweet potatoes, peeled and diced small
1 can (15 oz) black beans, drained and rinsed
1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp chili powder, ½ tsp smoked paprika, ½ tsp garlic powder
1 can (10 oz) mild red enchilada sauce
Olive oil, sour cream and cilantro for serving
steps: Preheat oven to 400°F. Toss diced sweet potato with olive oil and spices. Roast 20 minutes until tender and caramelized.
Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil until soft. Stir in black beans and corn; warm through.
Combine roasted sweet potato with the bean mixture.
Warm tortillas in a dry skillet so they roll without cracking. Spoon filling into each tortilla, roll tightly, place seam-side down in a greased 9x13 dish.
Pour enchilada sauce over top. Sprinkle cheese all over.
Bake 20 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbling. Serve with sour cream and cilantro.
meals.note: 💡 Warming the tortillas is the key step — cold corn tortillas crack when rolled.

meals.label: Meal C
meals.name: Lemon Herb Chicken Meatballs with Orzo
ings: ¼ cup white wine or chicken broth
steps: Mix ground chicken, breadcrumbs, egg, Parmesan, parsley, oregano, lemon zest, half the garlic, salt, and pepper. Roll into 16–18 small meatballs.
Heat olive oil in a large deep skillet over medium-high. Sear meatballs in batches, browning on 2–3 sides, about 4–5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Sauté onion until soft, 3–4 minutes. Add remaining garlic and cook 30 seconds. Deglaze with white wine.
Pour in chicken broth and bring to a simmer. Stir in orzo and cook 7–8 minutes, stirring often.
Stir in lemon juice and heavy cream. Nestle meatballs back in. Cook 4–5 more minutes until meatballs are cooked through.
Add spinach and stir until wilted. Finish with extra Parmesan and more lemon.
meals.note: 💡 Stir the orzo frequently so it doesn't stick. Kids love the little meatballs.

meals.label: Meal D
meals.name: Creamy Sausage and Peppers Pasta
ings: 1 red bell pepper, 1 yellow bell pepper (chopped)
steps: Boil pasta al dente per package directions.
Brown sausage in a skillet, breaking it up. Transfer to plate.
Cook onion and peppers in oil until softened, 7–8 minutes.
Reduce heat. Add butter and garlic; sprinkle in flour and cook 1 minute.
Stir in cream and Dijon. Thickens quickly.
Add sausage and spinach. Splash pasta water in, drain pasta, add to skillet. Toss and serve with Parmesan.
meals.note: Use ground sausage or remove meat from casings.

meals.label: Meal A
meals.name: Sausage White Bean Soup
steps: Brown sausage, remove and set aside.
Cook onion, garlic, carrots, celery until softened.
Return sausage. Add white beans, broth, herbs, salt, pepper. Simmer.
Cover and simmer 20–25 minutes. Garnish with parsley.
meals.note: Mash some beans before adding for creamier texture.

meals.label: Meal B
meals.name: Air Fryer Fish Tacos with Cilantro Lime Slaw
ings: Fish rub: chili powder, oregano, garlic powder, paprika, cayenne, cumin, salt, pepper
Cilantro lime slaw: coleslaw mix, mayo, lime juice, garlic, cilantro
steps: Spray air fryer basket with oil. Mix spices.
Pat fish dry, brush with olive oil, coat with spice rub, spritz with oil.
Air fry at 400°F for 8–10 minutes.
Toss together cilantro lime slaw.
Cut fish into pieces and serve in tortillas with slaw.
meals.note: No air fryer? Bake at 400°F for about 15 minutes.

meals.label: Meal C
meals.name: Miso Glazed Salmon Bowls
ings: 2 tbsp soy sauce, 2 tbsp honey, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp sesame oil
Jasmine rice, cucumber, carrots, edamame, sesame seeds, green onions
steps: Cook rice. Whisk together miso glaze.
Spoon glaze over salmon on a foil-lined sheet.
Broil at 400°F for 12–15 minutes, basting halfway.
Assemble bowls with rice, salmon, veggies. Drizzle with remaining glaze.
meals.note: Store components separately and assemble fresh.

meals.name: Chicken Pineapple Fried Rice
meals.label: Meal A
ings: ½ lb boneless skinless chicken thighs
1½ tbsp soy sauce, 1 tsp fish sauce
Marinade: soy sauce, sesame oil, cornstarch, baking soda
steps: Cook rice ahead and refrigerate overnight.
Slice and marinate chicken.
Fry chicken, remove. Sauté garlic and onion, add vegetables and pineapple.
Push to side, add rice with soy and fish sauce. Stir-fry.
Add chicken back, toss and serve.

meals.name: Greek Chicken Bowls with Tzatziki
meals.label: Meal B
steps: Marinate chicken overnight.
Make tzatziki: grated cucumber + yogurt + garlic + dill.
Cook rice. Make cucumber salad.
Cook chicken until golden, rest and slice.
Build bowls: rice, chicken, hummus, cucumber salad, tzatziki, feta.

meals.name: Asian Turkey Lettuce Wraps
meals.label: Meal C
ings: Hoisin, soy sauce, rice vinegar, sesame oil
Green onions, sesame seeds, shredded carrots
steps: Whisk sauce ingredients.
Sauté garlic and ginger, add turkey, cook through.
Add water chestnuts and sauce, cook 2 minutes.
Serve in lettuce cups with garnishes.
meals.note: 💡 Let kids build their own lettuce tacos.

meals.name: Shakshuka
meals.label: Meal A
ings: 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 onion, 1 red bell pepper, 4 garlic cloves
steps: Sauté onion and bell pepper 5 minutes.
Add garlic and spices, cook 1 minute.
Add tomatoes, break down, simmer 5 minutes.
Make 6 wells, crack eggs in each.
Cover and cook 5–8 minutes until eggs set.

meals.name: Lemon Herb Baked Cod with Asparagus & Rice
meals.label: Meal B
ings: Lemon, olive oil, garlic powder, thyme
steps: Preheat 400°F. Start rice.
Roast asparagus 8 min.
Add cod with herb-lemon mixture, bake 12–15 min.
Serve over rice.

meals.name: Turkey & Black Bean Taco Bowls
meals.label: Meal C
steps: Cook rice.
Brown turkey with onion, garlic, taco spices.
Add black beans and warm through.
Build bowls with all toppings.

meals.name: Sheet Pan Lemon Herb Salmon & Veggies
meals.label: Meal A
ings: Lemon, olive oil, garlic powder, dill
steps: Preheat 425°F. Roast veggies 12 min.
Add salmon with herb-lemon mixture.
Bake 12–15 min.
Serve with lemon wedges.

meals.name: Chicken Tikka Masala + Cauliflower
meals.label: Meal B
ings: Tomato sauce, heavy cream, basmati rice, naan
steps: Marinate chicken overnight.
Roast cauliflower at 425°F.
Sear chicken, build sauce.
Add tomato sauce and cream, return chicken and cauliflower.
Simmer until thick. Serve over rice.

meals.name: Pesto Chicken Tortellini & Veggies
meals.label: Meal C
steps: Cook chicken with sun-dried tomatoes.
Cook asparagus separately.
Cook tortellini, drain.
Toss chicken with pesto, add tortellini and tomatoes.
Plate with asparagus.
